creator: pawel@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello maintainers of ports affected by comms/spandsp update

Please test attached patch for any runtime problems. I've build
tested it and it seems build fine all of the affected ports.
Note that I skipped UPDATING part which will be needed to help
users to upgrade. If no one objects I plan to commit in 2 weeks
from today.
Next step will be deprecation of comms/spandsp-devel which will
be older than this port version wise.

Thanks.
